text: When starting CPR on a drowning victim, you should:

options.text: A) Start chest compressions before the victim is removed from the water
B) Drain water from the lungs before ventilating
C) Begin mouth-to-mouth ventilations as soon as possible

explanation: For a drowning victim, it is crucial to begin rescue breathing as soon as possible to provide oxygen, even before removing them from the water if safe to do so. Chest compressions are initiated if no pulse is detected after ventilations.
